title: Rental Deposit Scam
scenario: A landlord lists housing on a marketplace. They ask for a deposit immediately through a payment app and refuse any viewing or official paperwork.

answers.A: Send the deposit immediately to secure the room.
answers.B: Send the deposit, but only if the price is a good deal.
answers.C: Request viewing/contract and verify the listing through official university resources.
answers.D: Walk away and report the listing if it cannot be verified.

explanation: Rental deposit scams rely on urgency and lack of verifiable agreements. Verify through trusted channels and avoid irreversible payments.
proTip: If they refuse contracts and verification, assume it’s risky.
